texto: Couldn't he have come out and greeted her like a civil human being instead of lurking from his kitchen while she shared a clearly intimate moment with his brisket?
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tracy Ewens: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Couldn't he have come out and greeted her like a civil human being instead of lurking from his ki…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que tempo, food, humor pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de humor.
